##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Robert Jenkins
##DESCRIPTION=Reddish-yellow unconsolidated grains, associated with yellow or pale yellow salammoniac.

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
